title: cephalotaxus drupacea f. sphaeralis
intro: Cephalotaxus drupacea f. sphaeralis, also known as the Chinese plum yew, is a variety of the Cephalotaxus drupacea plant, which is a slow-growing, evergreen conifer native to China. The plant contains the alkaloid cephalotaxine, which has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antineoplastic effects. The health benefits of Cephalotaxus drupacea f. sphaeralis include its potential to treat various types of cancer, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. The plant is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or extract for its medicinal purposes, and is typically used in conjunction with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
